CustomField.label: Verified
CustomField.description: True once the citizen has presented the correct code for this challenge (design section 2.3/6.4, D-013). Set by VS_OtpService.verify() on a successful hash match; a caller (booking/registration journey) treats this flag as proof the mobile was OTP-verified. Default false -- verification must be earned, never assumed. TrackHistory disabled to keep the record transient (purged daily, design section 6.5).
